# terrible_community_general_ipa_sudocmd (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `sudocmd` (String) Sudo command.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description of this command.
- `state` (String) State to ensure.
